title: Glue trap licence application forms
body: "Use ‘A15 licence application form’ to apply for an individual glue trap licence.  Use ‘CL53 class licence: application to register’ to apply for a class licence.  Use ‘Report of action taken under A15 licence’ to report back to Natural England.  Use the ‘Glue trap reference form’ to provide a reference in support of a glue trap licence.  Read guidance on how to apply, how much it costs, and the conditions you must meet to hold a licence. "
